features: 🌸HIGH QUALITY MATERIAL - These hair ties are made of shiny sparkle holographic fabric and durable elastic bands, soft, comfortable and fashionable, easy to wear, can fix your hair well and will not hurt your hair. (Note: fabric has no elastic, only inner band has.)
🌸SPARKLE COLOR - Package include 8 different gradient mermaid color scrunchies, whose front and back also different color, all of these are beautiful and sparkle on the hair.
🌸MEASUREMENT - The metallic scrunchies inner diameter is approx. 4 cm / 1.5 inches, the outer diameter is approx. 11 cm / 4.3 inches, with elasticity, fit for thin or thick hair.

🌸FASHIONABLE HAIR ELASTICS - These colorful mermaid hair scrunchies are good assistant for your make up and easy to DIY your own hairstyle, make you stylish on various occasion, such as office, school, Christmas party, ceremonies, performance, cheerleader show, practical and beautiful for you.

🌸BEST GIFT CHOICE - New trendy fabric with shiny design hair bobbles, these hair bands suitable for all the ladies, good gift for youself or your friends and families. If there is any problem, just contact us by message, we will answer to you asap.
